unifiIntegration.theUniFiNetworkIntegrationIsAvailableToP: The UniFi integration is set up at the partner level. Switch to your partner scope to configure it.
unifiIntegration.connectYourUniFiSiteManagerAccountWithA: Connect your UniFi Site Manager account with a cloud API key. Breeze discovers your sites, gateways, switches, and access points, then syncs each one into its mapped Breeze site's Discovered Assets.
unifiIntegration.connectASelfHostedUniFiNetworkController: Connect a self-hosted UniFi Network controller. A Breeze agent on the controller's network polls it directly — no UniFi cloud account needed.
unifiIntegration.unifiNeedsToBeReconnectedTheStoredAPI: UniFi rejected the stored API key. Disconnect, then reconnect with a new key.
unifiIntegration.registerEachSelfHostedUniFiNetworkContro: Register each self-hosted UniFi Network controller. A Breeze agent on the controller's network polls its local Integration API (firmware ≥ 9.3) directly, so no UniFi cloud account is needed. Breeze stores the local API key encrypted and pushes it to the agent you choose.
unifiIntegration.mapEachAgentDiscoveredControllerSiteToA: Map each controller site your agent discovered to a Breeze site. Devices polled from it appear in the chosen site's Discovered Assets.
unifiIntegration.noSitesDiscoveredYetOnceTheAssignedAgent: No sites discovered yet. Once the assigned agent reaches the controller (within ~1 minute), its sites appear here to map.
unifiIntegration.mapEachDiscoveredUniFiSiteToABreeze: Map each discovered UniFi site to a Breeze site. Devices synced from it appear in the chosen site's Discovered Assets.
unifiIntegration.noUniFiHostsOrSitesWereDiscoveredFor: No UniFi hosts or sites were discovered for this account yet.
unifiIntegration.assignABreezeAgentAtTheSiteTo: Assign a Breeze agent at the site to poll each UniFi console's local Network Integration API (firmware ≥ 9.3) for per-port PoE, device health, and connected clients. Breeze stores the local API key encrypted and pushes it to the agent you choose.
unifiIntegration.livePerDevicePoEHealthAndConnectedClient: Live per-device PoE/health and connected clients for a mapped site.
unifiIntegration.theMostRecentSyncRunsNewestFirst: The most recent sync runs (newest first).
unifiIntegration.noSyncRunsYetTriggerASyncTo: No syncs yet. Use Sync now to pull your UniFi devices into Discovered Assets.
unifiIntegration.discoverAndReconcileUniFiNetworkAssetsAc: Sync UniFi network devices into your sites' Discovered Assets.

unifiIntegration.couldNotLoadConfiguration: Could not load UniFi configuration data. Check your connection and refresh.
unifiIntegration.couldNotReachTelemetry: Could not reach the server to load telemetry.
